nasb.text: Thus the second day they marched around the city once and returned to the camp; they did so for six days.

esv.text: And the second day they marched around the city once, and returned into the camp. So they did for six days.

cnv.text: 第二日，眾人又繞城一次，然後回到營裡去；六日他們都是這樣行。

ccb.text: 这一天他们又绕城一圈，然后各自回营。六天都是这样。
